name: unified-image-generator
description: Single model for multiple image generation tasks including style transfer and editing
content:
## All-in-One Multi-task Image Generator

### Core Concept

Single model for multiple image generation tasks including style transfer and editing

### Implementation

Key implementation aspects:
1. Data preparation and preprocessing
2. Model architecture design
3. Training procedure
4. Evaluation and validation

This skill enables Single model for multiple image generation tasks including style transfer and editing.

### When to Use

- Problem domain matches technique scope
- Required computational resources available
- Evaluation criteria well-defined

### When NOT to Use

- Limited data availability
- Tight latency requirements
- Domain significantly different
